objective: Test whether complementary generation policies and a deployable scheduler improve coverage/sample efficiency relative to single-policy sample-more.
primary_success_criteria: A deployable static portfolio or learned scheduler is on a better coverage/pass@1/forward-token Pareto frontier than base hot K=8.
Pass@1 proxy does not regress relative to base hot K=4 by more than 2 percentage points.
Parse rate stays within 5 percentage points of base hot K=4.
Oracle scheduler headroom is reported separately from deployable scheduler performance.
